news.t: Brendan McMenamy Promoted to Chief Financial Officer at Afinida

holdings.infoBox: BWTG is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.39%, Micron Technology at 5.00%, Morgan Stanley at 4.66%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.55%, and ASML Holding at 4.40%.

overview.description: The Brendan Wood TopGun ETF (BWTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in a model portfolio of 25 large- and mid-cap US companies identified to have the highest quality ratings. BWTG was launched on Sep 11, 2023 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: 'TopGun' ETF Outperforms S&P 500
data.text: Tuttle Capital Management CEO and CIO, Matthew Tuttle, discusses the Brendan Wood TopGun ETF (BWTG), which has out performed the S&P 500 since November 2023. He speaks with Scarlet Fu and Katie Greife...
